title: Generate Test Cases with Empty Requirements Selection (Zero Items in Collection)
description: Verifies that the system correctly handles an attempt to generate test cases when zero requirements are selected from the requirements list — testing the empty-collection boundary.
expected_result: The system prevents test case generation when no requirements are selected. A clear validation error is shown: 'Please select at least one requirement'. No API call is made and no test cases are generated.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: The generation page loads and the requirements list is visible

test_steps.action: Verify no requirements are pre-selected in the requirements list
test_steps.expected: The requirements list is visible and no checkboxes are checked

test_steps.action: Ensure any pre-checked requirements are unchecked
Click the Generate Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: The system blocks generation and shows a validation error for the empty requirements selection

test_steps.action: Verify the validation error message for empty selection
test_steps.expected: Error reads 'Please select at least one requirement'

assertion.value: Please select at least one requirement
